meta_ensemble.description: LogisticRegression stacking XGBoost + LightGBM + IsolationForest + LOF predictions. Final score = 0.60*ml_prob + 0.15*anomaly_mean + 0.20*min(behavioral,0.65) + escalation(max 0.12). ML ensemble is primary; behavioral is bounded and cannot dominate.
meta_ensemble.note: Runtime final_prob is a weighted composition. Behavioral adds at most 0.20*0.65=0.13 to the score. Contextual escalation adds at most 0.12. No hard behavioral floor override.

threshold_description: BLOCK >= 0.72, FLAG >= 0.45, APPROVE < 0.45. Runtime score = 0.60*ml_prob + 0.15*anomaly_mean + 0.20*min(beh,0.65) + escalation. ML ensemble (meta-learner) is the primary driver.
